meta.title: SDL-MCP minimal symbol exploration
meta.anchor: Symbol Delta Ledger: cards-first, graph-aware context for AI coding agents
meta.summary: Compare nine minimal symbols for a precision engineering product that filters repository noise into task-relevant context.

preserve: brand meaning: high-signal context from complex codebases
audience: engineers and AI coding-agent users
header lockup: symbol paired with SDL-MCP wordmark
avoid: robot heads or generic AI brains
literal source code or fake API labels
readable text inside generated symbol tiles
gradients required for the mark to work

routes.label: Aperture Gate
routes.prompt: Create one original, minimal vector-style logo symbol only for SDL-MCP on a pure white inspection background. The product turns repository noise into bounded, task-relevant context for AI coding agents. Use solid black geometry with one restrained electric-cyan accent. Flat, crisp, centered square tile, generous clear space, strong silhouette at 16px. No wordmark, no letters, no readable text, no gradients, no shadows, no mockup, no watermark. Route: Aperture Gate. Show a precise open delta-like aperture that narrows a wide field into one clean forward path, representing selective context retrieval.
routes.rationale: Tests the product metaphor without depending on letters.
routes.best_for: Header lockup, app icon, and favicon exploration.
routes.decision_advice: Compare silhouette, product meaning, and monochrome legibility before selecting.
routes.watch_out: Must not resemble a camera brand or play button.
routes.next_step: Vectorize the selected route and test it at 16px, 24px, and 32px.

routes.label: Prism Gate
routes.prompt: Create one original, minimal vector-style logo symbol only for SDL-MCP on a pure white inspection background. The product turns repository noise into bounded, task-relevant context for AI coding agents. Use solid black geometry with one restrained electric-cyan accent. Flat, crisp, centered square tile, generous clear space, strong silhouette at 16px. No wordmark, no letters, no readable text, no gradients, no shadows, no mockup, no watermark. Route: Prism Gate. Use a compact asymmetric prism that receives several thin incoming paths and releases one deliberate ordered path. Keep it architectural rather than illustrative.
routes.rationale: Frames SDL-MCP as a precision selector.
routes.best_for: Header lockup, app icon, and favicon exploration.
routes.decision_advice: Compare silhouette, product meaning, and monochrome legibility before selecting.
routes.watch_out: Must not look like a generic funnel or security badge.

routes.label: Bounded Path
routes.prompt: Create one original, minimal vector-style logo symbol only for SDL-MCP on a pure white inspection background. The product turns repository noise into bounded, task-relevant context for AI coding agents. Use solid black geometry with one restrained electric-cyan accent. Flat, crisp, centered square tile, generous clear space, strong silhouette at 16px. No wordmark, no letters, no readable text, no gradients, no shadows, no mockup, no watermark. Route: Bounded Path. Use two bold interlocking planes to create a protected channel around one selected line, suggesting policy-gated code access without a lock or shield.
routes.rationale: Emphasizes controlled context delivery and trust.
routes.best_for: Header lockup, app icon, and favicon exploration.
routes.decision_advice: Compare silhouette, product meaning, and monochrome legibility before selecting.
routes.watch_out: The form must stay open and active, not defensive.

routes.label: Continuous S Delta
routes.prompt: Create one original, minimal vector-style logo symbol only for SDL-MCP on a pure white inspection background. The product turns repository noise into bounded, task-relevant context for AI coding agents. Use solid black geometry with one restrained electric-cyan accent. Flat, crisp, centered square tile, generous clear space, strong silhouette at 16px. No wordmark, no letters, no readable text, no gradients, no shadows, no mockup, no watermark. Route: Continuous S Delta. Construct an abstract S-shaped path that resolves into a subtle delta triangle through negative space. Engineered, calm, and compact, never calligraphic.
routes.rationale: Connects the brand name to change intelligence.
routes.best_for: Header lockup, app icon, and favicon exploration.
routes.decision_advice: Compare silhouette, product meaning, and monochrome legibility before selecting.
routes.watch_out: The S must stay legible at favicon size.

routes.label: Sliced Delta
routes.prompt: Create one original, minimal vector-style logo symbol only for SDL-MCP on a pure white inspection background. The product turns repository noise into bounded, task-relevant context for AI coding agents. Use solid black geometry with one restrained electric-cyan accent. Flat, crisp, centered square tile, generous clear space, strong silhouette at 16px. No wordmark, no letters, no readable text, no gradients, no shadows, no mockup, no watermark. Route: Sliced Delta. Build a bold geometric S from three precise segments; one segment creates a small delta-shaped cut that implies meaningful change.
routes.rationale: Expresses Symbol Delta Ledger through controlled change.

routes.label: Stacked Ledger Slice
routes.prompt: Create one original, minimal vector-style logo symbol only for SDL-MCP on a pure white inspection background. The product turns repository noise into bounded, task-relevant context for AI coding agents. Use solid black geometry with one restrained electric-cyan accent. Flat, crisp, centered square tile, generous clear space, strong silhouette at 16px. No wordmark, no letters, no readable text, no gradients, no shadows, no mockup, no watermark. Route: Stacked Ledger Slice. Use three compact horizontal bands that compress into one highlighted diagonal slice, representing context cards, a ledger, and a selected path without becoming a database icon.

routes.label: Delta Ledger
routes.prompt: Create one original, minimal vector-style logo symbol only for SDL-MCP on a pure white inspection background. The product turns repository noise into bounded, task-relevant context for AI coding agents. Use solid black geometry with one restrained electric-cyan accent. Flat, crisp, centered square tile, generous clear space, strong silhouette at 16px. No wordmark, no letters, no readable text, no gradients, no shadows, no mockup, no watermark. Route: Delta Ledger. routes.rationale: Elevates the Delta Ledger name into a geometric icon.
